# Find the Blade of the First King

The [[Blade of the First King]] was lost during the Siege of [[Ironhold]]. [[Mira the Scout]] believes it may still be somewhere in [[The Undercrypt]].

## Objectives

1. Search [[The Undercrypt]] for clues
2. Confront the [[Shadow Court]] agents guarding the lower levels
3. Recover the [[Blade of the First King]]
